title: CYBER-SENIORS - 211info
text: CYBER-SENIORS CYBER-SENIORS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides technology support and training using an intergenerational, volunteer model. Services include one-on-one tech calls, daily webinars, and additional learning resources. Services are available by phone, virtually, and in person in some communities. Trainers are welcome to volunteer. Website Los Angeles, CA 90048 Eligibility: Trainees: Age 60 and older Volunteer Trainers: Age 14 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 6am-5pm Email (844) 217-3057 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (844) 217-3057 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, French, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Computer Literacy Training Programs * Older Adults Volunteer Opportunities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
